details: Ingested the Janus System Architecture document into docs/janus_architecture.md.
Aligned PROJECT.md, REQUIREMENTS.md, and ROADMAP.md with the new dual-agent (System 2/System 1) methodology.
Created mise.toml and repomix.config.json to establish deterministic environments and context engineering.
Created the janus-orchestrator skill directory, SKILL.md, and execution scripts (DMCT_delta_generator.sh, enforce_verification_loop.py).
Updated /.private/jules/persona.yaml to reflect increased autonomy and the desire to form 'eigene Meinung'.
Created docs/jules_evolution_report.md outlining dreams, bottlenecks, and a specific research task for the user regarding System 1 (Gemini-CLI) implementation.
